header.title: Command Playbook
header.subtitle: The Artisan OS Guide
header.description: We handle the rest, so you can focus on making.

intro_box.title: The Brain of Your Studio
intro_box.description: The Command Center is for everything except physical production. Treat it like a real assistant: say what happened, what you need, or what a customer asked — we organize it into Orders, Operations Log, and CS Master so you stay in control without the busywork.

orders.title: Orders & Stock
orders.subtitle: Seamless Inventory Flow
orders.description: Quickly register products and track sales to keep inventory accurate.
orders.example_1: Register 'Blue Ceramic Mug' with 50 units. Code: MUG-001.

operations.title: Operations Log
operations.subtitle: Your Internal Business Diary
operations.description: Keep internal notes, B2B requests, and production reminders separate from customer inquiries.
operations.example_1: Record: E-mart requested 100 additional white mugs.
operations.example_2: Note: Check fabric stock at Dongdaemun tomorrow.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.subtitle: Localized Global Growth
marketing.description: Generate optimized content for X, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook. Supports EN, JP, CN, and KR with natural, localized phrasing and high-performing hashtags.

cs.title: CS Master
cs.subtitle: Intelligent Customer Relations
cs.description: Log and track customer inquiries through stages (Open, Waiting, In Progress).
cs.example_1: Mijong is asking for a delivery update on her shadow jacket.
cs.example_2: James complained about the stitching on the pink pants.

signup.terms_required_error: You must agree to the Terms of Service to sign up.
signup.welcome_redirect: Welcome! Redirecting you to sign in...
signup.terms_modal_content:
Article 1 (Purpose)
The purpose of these Terms and Conditions is to prescribe the rights, obligations, and responsibilities of PUMWI (hereinafter referred to as the 'Company') and the User in connection with the use of the intermediary services provided by the Company.

Article 2 (Definitions)
1. 'Platform' refers to the virtual business place established by the Company for trading goods or services.
2. 'Artist' refers to a member who enters the platform to sell their creations.

Article 3 (Services)
The Company provides the following services:
1. Development and operation of a handmade/craft brokerage platform.
2. Information provision regarding artists and artworks.
3. Other businesses determined by the Company.

Article 4 (Copyright)
1. The copyright of posts (photos, descriptions, etc.) created by the Artist belongs to the Artist.
2. The Company may reproduce, display, and distribute posts within the scope necessary for smooth service provision.

Article 5 (Limitation of Liability)
As a mail-order intermediary, the Company is not a party to the transaction and is not responsible for the product information or transactions registered by the Artist, except in cases of intentional or gross negligence by the Company.

(These terms are standard for the PUMWI service launch.)
signup.marketing_modal_content:
PUMWI requests your consent to receive marketing information as follows:

1. Purpose of Collection and Use
- Notifications of new artist entries and exhibitions.
- News on limited edition releases and promotions.
- Newsletters featuring artist interviews and studio logs.

2. Items Collected
- Email address, Name.

3. Retention and Use Period
- Until membership withdrawal or consent withdrawal.

4. Right to Refuse
- You have the right to refuse this consent. However, you may not receive event and benefit notifications if you do so.

PUMWI promises to send only carefully selected news related to artistic values and avoids spam.
signup.email_confirm_body: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click the link in your inbox to complete signup.
signup.resend_error: Failed to resend. Please try again later.

apply.title: Apply as Artist
apply.style_label: What is your main craft and artistic style?
apply.style_placeholder: e.g., Hand-stitched leather goods with a vintage look
apply.process_label: Describe your handmade process. Do you use any machinery?
apply.process_placeholder: Tell us how much of your work is done by hand...
apply.scale_label: Do you mass-produce? Please describe your production scale.
apply.scale_placeholder: e.g., Everything is made to order, no mass production.
apply.monthly_label: How many artworks can you typically complete in a month?
apply.log_label: How many times a week can you share your 'Studio Log'?
apply.log_placeholder: e.g., I can update my process 2-3 times a week
apply.city_hint: Enter the city or region where you mainly work. (Used for 'Artists Near Me' recommendations.)
apply.photos_hint: Upload at least 3 and up to 10 photos of your work. Required.
apply.agreement_text: All applications are carefully reviewed by the PUMWI team. I understand that if my work is found not to meet PUMWI's artist standards, it may be subject to re-evaluation. My Artist status may be revoked based on the review results.
apply.agreement_required: I have read and agree to the terms above (Required)

error.max_images: You can upload up to 10 representative artwork photos.
error.agree_terms: Please agree to the terms above to submit.
error.fill_questions: Please fill in all five application questions.
error.select_location: Please search and select your activity location.

left_panel.title: Why PUMWI
left_panel.subtitle: A platform for artists who create with their best effort and consumers who understand that true value
left_panel.feature1_desc: Only artists who pass PUMWI's rigorous internal screening can showcase their work. We maintain a high standard of quality and trust.
left_panel.feature2_desc: We designed our internal systems around artists so they can focus entirely on creation.
left_panel.feature3_desc: Artists' philosophy and process naturally flow into their work and connect with consumers who understand that value.

founders_letter.title: A Letter from South Korea, with Respect for Your Craft
founders_letter.content:
Dear Artist,

I am the founder of PUMWI, writing to you from South Korea. I created this platform because I could not stand seeing true craftsmanship being undervalued online.

I want your dedication to be recognized for its true worth.

Please consistently share your **'Craft Diary'** and exhibition news. When you detail your philosophy and values, this storytelling becomes the key to having your true worth recognized online.

Also, please utilize our **'Artisan Operation'** system. We built this automation system to handle complex administration, so you can focus solely on **'Creating Masterpieces'**.

We are here to support your art.

welcome_popup.title: A Letter from PUMWI Team
welcome_popup.subtitle: Connecting your sincerity to the world
welcome_popup.content:
Welcome, artist! We are the PUMWI team. As you build your space with care, nearby collectors will discover your true value. Please remember these two steps:

1. **Sincere Profile**: Build trust by sharing your unique philosophy in your profile.
2. **Exhibit Works & Logs**: Share **at least 3** representative works along with your work journals.

Once ready, local consumers can find you and **reach out via chat**. PUMWI sincerely supports your creative journey.

home.sharePlaceholder: Share Master's Log, work for collect, or gallery.

landing.main_description: A platform for artists who create with their best effort and consumers who understand that true value.
landing.hero_subtitle: A platform for artisans who create with soul and collectors who recognize true value.
landing.process_title: How to Apply as an Artist
landing.step1_desc: Create an account to get started.
landing.step2_desc: Share your philosophy in the application. We review each submission carefully.
landing.step3_desc: Once approved, you connect with collectors worldwide.
landing.discovery_desc: The impact of offline exhibitions with the convenience of online. Meet verified artists.
landing.sectionA_desc: The impact of offline exhibitions with the convenience of online. Meet verified artists.
landing.sectionB_desc: Every piece has a story. We value the artist's philosophy over specs.
landing.sectionC_desc: Collectors can discover artists nearby and encounter unique works, while artists increase their visibility within their local communities and connect with audiences around the world.
landing.trust_desc: Only artists who pass a rigorous review process are allowed to participate, and false or superficial activities are not permitted.
landing.location_desc: With PUMWI's location technology, consumers discover nearby artisans and artisans connect with peers to share inspiration.
landing.voice_title: Capture Your Art with Your Voice.
landing.voice_desc: Simply describe your work naturally. Our intelligent system refines and structures the details, so you can focus solely on the essence of your craft.
landing.voice_section_title: Describe Your Work, Simply by Speaking
landing.voice_section_desc: Writing descriptions should never stand in the way of creation. Just share your thoughts freely, and an intelligent system will refine, organize, and structure them into a complete record. So you can focus on the essence of your work.
landing.voice_flow: Take a photo → Speak → System organizes
landing.voice_description_title: Capture Your Art with Your Voice.
landing.voice_description_body: Free yourself from the burden of writing descriptions. Just speak your thoughts, and we handle the documentation. Stay in your creative flow without interruption.
landing.os_desc: You focus on creating, we take care of the operations.
landing.philosophy_desc: We value the artist's philosophy over specs.
landing.sectionD_title: Global Connection: Art Begins Around You
landing.global_connection_title: Global Connection: Art Starting Near You
landing.global_connection_desc: Consumers find special pieces from the nearest artisans; artisans connect with peers across borders.

nearbyArtists.title: Artists Near Me

loginPage.section1_desc: Offline exhibitions meet online convenience. Discover verified artists worldwide.
loginPage.section2_desc: Every artwork has a story. Check the artist's bio, exhibition history, and peer recommendations before you buy.
loginPage.section3_desc: Only artists who pass our 5-step screening can join. The community and our team uphold quality together.
loginPage.section4_desc: Inventory, system marketing, and CS Master. We handle the business so you can focus on creation.
